questions.question: Which sentence contains a word that is spelled incorrectly?
options: His performance in the play was just mediocre.
She paid the tuition fee before the semester began.
They enjoyed a peaceful evening by the lake.
The view from the mountaintop was tramendous.
questions.answer: The view from the mountaintop was tramendous.
questions.explanation: Option A: This option states: His performance in the play was just mediocre. Option B: This option states: She paid the tuition fee before the semester began. Option C: This option states: They enjoyed a peaceful evening by the lake. Option D: The view from the mountaintop was tramendous. is the accepted standard spelling in this context. **Option D** correctly applies: 'The view from the mountaintop was tramendous.' matches the spelling requirement asked in the question.
